ksa_text: Knowledge of data classification tools and techniques, including sensitivity classification (public, internal, confidential), risk-based data categorization, classification policy implementation, and use in access control and protection strategies.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Processes are in place for robust engagement with relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-017 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4116 is insufficient to establish relevance to survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.412, nice=0.397, nist_ai_rmf=0.392) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4116 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-K-017 (composite 0.4116) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4116 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Survey Researcher at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4116 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4116, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
